description_long: This is a futuristic, angular airplane with a predominantly red and gray color scheme, featuring a sleek, pointed nose and a canopy with a blue-tinted windshield. The wings are sharply swept back and extend outward with additional vertical and horizontal stabilizers, giving the aircraft a multi-layered, aggressive appearance. The fuselage is compact and streamlined, with two prominent engine nacelles mounted on either side, each integrated into the wing structure. The tail section is split into twin vertical stabilizers, and the undercarriage consists of long, blade-like landing gear. The surface finish is smooth and metallic, with visible panel lines and minimal surface texture. The overall design suggests a high-speed, possibly combat-oriented aircraft with advanced aerodynamics.
description: A sleek, angular red and gray airplane with swept-back wings, twin vertical stabilizers, and a blue-tinted cockpit canopy.
description_view_0: Front view shows the pointed nose, blue canopy, and the layered, swept-back wings with prominent vertical stabilizers.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the elongated, blade-like landing gear and the compact, streamlined fuselage with integrated engine nacelles.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the twin vertical stabilizers, engine exhausts, and the wide, multi-layered wing structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the landing gear and the angular, aerodynamic profile of the aircraft.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with sharply swept, multi-layered wings and pronounced anhedral angles; no visible winglets.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines integrated into the wing roots.
attribute_tail_design: Twin vertical stabilizers in an H-tail configuration.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed, blade-like tricycle landing gear with one nose and two main gear units.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a blue-tinted canopy.
